content.sentence: Tôi cảm thấy ___ sau một ngày làm việc.

translation.en: I feel tired after a day of work.

exampleSentences: Sau khi làm việc cả ngày, anh cảm thấy rất mệt.
Em thường mệt vào buổi tối sau khi học xong.
Chị không muốn đi chơi hôm nay vì chị hơi mệt.
exampleSentencesTranslated: After working all day, I feel very tired.
I am often tired in the evening after finishing studying.
I don't want to go out today because I am a little tired.

definitions.vi: Cảm thấy cần nghỉ ngơi hoặc ngủ; mệt mỏi.
definitions.es: Sentir la necesidad de descansar o dormir; fatigado.
definitions.en: Feeling a need to rest or sleep; fatigued.

example.vi: Tôi cảm thấy mệt sau một ngày làm việc.
example.en: I feel tired after a day of work.
example.es: Me siento cansado después de un día de trabajo.

notes:
mệt means tired or exhausted. It describes how your body or mind feels when you don’t have energy.

It’s an adjective, but in Vietnamese you don’t need “to be” — just say the subject + mệt. It describes people most often, but also parts of the body (mắt mệt, người mệt).

You can strengthen it with rất, quá, lắm. A stronger, slightly more formal word is mệt mỏi. Opposite: khỏe (healthy, well, energetic).
notes_md:
**mệt** means *tired* or *exhausted*. It describes how your body or mind feels when you don’t have energy.

It’s an adjective, but in Vietnamese you don’t need “to be” — just say the subject + **mệt**. It describes people most often, but also parts of the body (mắt mệt, người mệt).

You can strengthen it with **rất**, **quá**, **lắm**. A stronger, slightly more formal word is **mệt mỏi**. Opposite: **khỏe** (healthy, well, energetic).

translation.en: I feel very tired after running.

content.sentence: Tôi cảm thấy rất ___ sau khi chạy.
